utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 of these items. Checking details: (1) health_coverage — includes both physical and mental health insurance with costs clearly stated; (2) property_coverage — includes home/contents insurance with costs and deductible; (3) travel_coverage — includes travel insurance with global coverage and costs specified; (4) additional_services — included with examples and note on costs; (5) total_budget — includes both monthly and annual cost breakdown. All items are fully specified according to the required details.

In the ground-truth data, the corresponding entries for LifeFirst Standard Plan exist in three categories: primary_health_coverage → physical_health → LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 8), primary_health_coverage → mental_health → LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 8), property_protection → home_content → LifeFirst Standard Coverage (rating 8), and mobility_coverage → travel_insurance → LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 7).
